author: nflaig
content:
<@592004585506340885> somehow we are passing spec tests now without the spec change for capella fork epoch, I did some restructuring in the test harness so might be due to that, I haven't spent much more time debugging this, it's pretty time intensive to rebuild spec tests and re-run against lodestar, I will be OOO from tomorrow for the whole of next week until 24th so I am not sure I will make it

generally spec tests look fine though, maybe <@1035747431461167125> can further dig into the pre-capella check, will leave some breadcrumps for him and at least push what I have

it's probably fine to proceed with spec tests, I guess for gloas, we might wanna wait a bit and get the spec first finalized as is?

content: also if you want lodekeeper to run something, just ask him on our discord or in STEEL #lodestar channel (use a thread) 😄
